name: hermes-android-device-controller
description: ADB-based Android device controller for Hermes, including Pixel 6 status, Android preflight, screenshots/XML, and WeChat approval plan reports.

tools.name: android_device_status
tools.description: Return ADB device, screen, and foreground app status for the connected Android device.

tools.name: android_open_app
tools.description: Open an Android package by package name via ADB.

tools.name: android_input_tap
tools.description: Tap screen coordinates via ADB input.

tools.name: android_input_swipe
tools.description: Swipe between screen coordinates via ADB input.

tools.name: android_input_text
tools.description: Input text via ADB input.

tools.name: android_keyevent
tools.description: Send an Android keyevent code via ADB input.

tools.name: android_dump_screen_xml
tools.description: Dump the current UIAutomator screen XML.

tools.name: android_take_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot from the connected Android device.

tools.name: android_set_mock_location
tools.description: Send a test-environment mock location broadcast to the Hermes Mock Location Helper App.

tools.name: android_open_enterprise_app
tools.description: Open the configured enterprise Android app for read-only UI probing.

tools.name: android_probe_current_screen
tools.description: Capture foreground package, UI XML, and screenshot paths for the current Android screen.

tools.name: android_parse_current_ui
tools.description: Dump and parse the current Android UIAutomator XML into relevant UI nodes.

tools.name: android_summarize_current_screen
tools.description: Summarize the current Android screen with clickable elements, input fields, and sensitive action risk markers.

tools.name: android_enterprise_login
tools.description: Perform authorized enterprise app credential login from local environment variables, stopping for user-provided SMS verification when required.

tools.name: android_enterprise_detect_sms_code
tools.description: Detect whether the current enterprise app screen is waiting for an SMS verification code.

tools.name: android_enterprise_submit_sms_code
tools.description: Submit a user-provided 4-8 digit enterprise app SMS verification code.

tools.name: android_enterprise_handle_wechat_sms_code
tools.description: Extract and submit an enterprise app SMS code from WeChat text in the format 企信验证码：xxxxxx.

tools.name: android_detect_approval_menus
tools.description: Detect known enterprise approval menu entries on the current app screen.

tools.name: android_build_daily_approval_plan
tools.description: Build a dry-run enterprise approval plan with screenshots and UI XML without approving anything.

tools.name: android_build_approval_wechat_report
tools.description: Build a concise WeChat Markdown approval plan report with approval type, status, count, details, and handling method; it does not execute approvals.

tools.name: android_probe_approval_menu
tools.description: Open one approval menu by name for dry-run UI probing only.

tools.name: android_execute_daily_approval_plan
tools.description: Execute eligible approval items only after exact user confirmation: 确认审批.

tools.name: android_execute_work_hour_approval
tools.description: Controlled work-hour approval execution gated by the exact confirmation phrase.

tools.name: android_execute_attendance_exception_approval
tools.description: Controlled attendance-exception approval execution gated by the exact confirmation phrase.

tools.name: android_execute_leave_approval
tools.description: Controlled leave approval execution gated by the exact confirmation phrase.

tools.name: android_execute_comp_time_approval
tools.description: Controlled comp-time approval execution gated by the exact confirmation phrase.

tools.name: android_execute_missing_clock_approval
tools.description: Controlled missing-clock approval execution gated by the exact confirmation phrase.
